subject: Civic Education
source_title: First Term SS3 Civic Education E-Learning Note
learning_objectives: Explain the advantages of constitutional democracy
Identify the disadvantages of constitutional democracy

sections.heading: Advantages
sections.content: IT ALLOWS FOR PEACEFUL CHANGE OF GOVERNMENT, IT ALLOWS THE PEOPLE TO CHOOSE THEIR LEADERS, IT PROTECTS THE FUNDAMENTAL HUMAN RIGHTS OF PEOPLE, IT PROMOTES POPULAR PARTICIPATION, IT PROMOTES GOOD GOVERNANCE, IT PROMOTES DEVELOPMENT.

sections.heading: Disadvantages
sections.content: IT IS EXPENSIVE TO RUN, DELAY IN POLICY MAKING, MINORITY CANNOT HAVE THEIR WAY IN A DEMOCRACY, INABILITY OF THE ELECTORATE TO REMOVE A BAD GOVERNMENT UNTIL ELECTION PERIOD.
